mapper.select: WITH sales_monthly AS ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(order_date, '%Y-%m') AS ym, SUM(product_total) AS amount FROM sales WHERE order_date >= #{startDate} AND order_date < #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(order_date, '%Y-%m') ), monthly_shipping_extra AS ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(t.order_date, '%Y-%m') AS ym, SUM(t.total_delivery_fee) AS amount FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT df.order_number, sw.order_date, df.total_delivery_fee FROM delivery_fees df JOIN sales sw ON sw.order_number = df.order_number AND sw.platform = df.platform WHERE sw.shipping_included = 1 AND sw.order_date >= #{startDate} AND sw.order_date < #{endDate} ) t GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(t.order_date, '%Y-%m') ), sales_final AS ( SELECT s.ym, s.amount + COALESCE(ms.amount, 0) AS amount FROM sales_monthly s LEFT JOIN monthly_shipping_extra ms ON s.ym = ms.ym ), purchase_monthly AS ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(purchase_date, '%Y-%m') AS ym, SUM(total_cost) AS amount FROM purchases WHERE product_id IS NOT NULL AND purchase_date >= #{startDate} AND purchase_date < #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(purchase_date, '%Y-%m') ), expense_monthly AS ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(expense_date, '%Y-%m') AS ym, SUM(total_cost) AS amount FROM expenses WHERE expense_date >= #{startDate} AND expense_date < #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(expense_date, '%Y-%m') ), all_tables AS ( SELECT '매출' AS gb, ym, amount FROM sales_final UNION ALL SELECT '매입' AS gb, ym, amount FROM purchase_monthly UNION ALL SELECT '비용' AS gb, ym, amount FROM expense_monthly ) SELECT ym, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN gb = '매출' THEN amount END), 0) AS salesAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN gb = '매입' THEN amount END), 0) AS purchaseAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN gb = '비용' THEN amount END), 0) AS expenseAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN gb = '매출' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN gb = '매입' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN gb = '비용' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS profit FROM all_tables GROUP BY ym ORDER BY ym
